title: medicago recta
intro: Medicago recta, also known as red clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its isoflavones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Red clover is used to alleviate menopausal symptoms, such as hot flashes and night sweats, and has been found to have health benefits in reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and osteoporosis. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used as a herbal supplement in various forms, including capsules and tablets.
